FLOW.COMMENT: isTransactionSuspended - determine if the current transaction has been suspended based on sender/receiver/doctype - return true/false

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_isTransactionSuspended - return true/false if the current transaction has been suspended at this point

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT WORKFLOW_NAME, wf.SUSPEND_ON_ACCEPT AS WFSOA, SENDER_TP_ALIAS, alias.SUSPEND_ON_ACCEPT AS TPSOA, TP_NAME...

Values.value: SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, tfw_trans_active.WORKFLOW_NAME, tfw_workflow.SUSPEND_ON_ACCEPT AS WFSUSP, tfw_trans_active.SENDER_TP_ALIAS AS TPALIAS, ENVIRONMENT, CLUSTER_NAME, tfw_tp_alias.SUSPEND_ON_ACCEPT AS TPSUSP, TP_NAME FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE LEFT JOIN TFW_WORKFLOW ON tfw_trans_active.WORKFLOW_NAME=tfw_workflow.WORKFLOW_NAME LEFT JOIN TFW_TP_ALIAS ON tfw_trans_active.SENDER_TP_ALIAS=tfw_tp_alias.TP_ALIAS LEFT JOIN TFW_TRADINGPARTNER ON tfw_tp_alias.TP_IID=tfw_tradingpartner.TP_IID WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%' ORDER BY ENVIRONMENT DESC,CLUSTER_NAME DESC

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT WORKFLOW_NAME, wf.SUSPEND_AT_DELIVER AS WFSAD, RECEIVER_TP_ALIAS, alias.SUSPEND_AT_DELIVER AS TPSAD, TP_NAME...

Values.value: SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, tfw_trans_active.WORKFLOW_NAME, tfw_workflow.SUSPEND_AT_DELIVER AS WFSUSP, tfw_trans_active.RECEIVER_TP_ALIAS AS TPALIAS, ENVIRONMENT, CLUSTER_NAME, tfw_tp_alias.SUSPEND_AT_DELIVER AS TPSUSP, TP_NAME FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE LEFT JOIN TFW_WORKFLOW ON tfw_trans_active.WORKFLOW_NAME=tfw_workflow.WORKFLOW_NAME LEFT JOIN TFW_TP_ALIAS ON tfw_trans_active.RECEIVER_TP_ALIAS=tfw_tp_alias.TP_ALIAS LEFT JOIN TFW_TRADINGPARTNER ON tfw_tp_alias.TP_IID=tfw_tradingpartner.TP_IID WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%' ORDER BY ENVIRONMENT DESC,CLUSTER_NAME DESC

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0505 Internal error: invalid point type '%point%' - unable to continue

Values.value: FE0505 Internal error: invalid point type '%point%' - unable to continue

INVOKE.NAME: sRows == 0
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0506 Could not find transaction id '%sFwTransactionId%' in active table

Values.value: FE0506 Could not find transaction id '%sFwTransactionId%' in active table

MAP.COMMENT: extract wfname=WORKFLOW_NAME and tpalias=TPALIAS since these will be in all records

INVOKE.COMMENT: Transaction suspended WORKFLOW.SUSPEND='%wfsusp%' for %wfname% and TPALIAS.SUSPEND='%tpsusp%' for %tpname% (%tpalias%)

Values.value: Transaction suspended WORKFLOW.SUSPEND='%wfsusp%' for %wfname% and TPALIAS.SUSPEND='%tpsusp%' for %tpname% (%tpalias%)

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0507 Alias record for tpalias '%tpalias%' for environment '%environment%' and cluster '%clusterName%' not found

Values.value: FE0507 Alias record for tpalias '%tpalias%' for environment '%environment%' and cluster '%clusterName%' not found
